title: Wave 28 - Manager auth/session UX hardening
description: Coordinate Wave 28 delivery for manager auth/session UX hardening: remove dev-first login bootstrap assumptions, normalize auth/session metadata for mobile, and preserve deterministic unauthorized and session-expired recovery flows.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 28 roadmap includes architect, backend, mobile, and QA sequencing with PR strategy
Epic definition captures manager auth/session UX hardening objective and Docker-only backend policy
Execution plan records Google AG as planner/reviewer mitigation and Aider as primary executor
